# GitHub Issue Templates for Dallas - Presentation Backfill

**Generated by:** Keaton (Lead)  
**Date:** 2025-01-28  
**Purpose:** Reusable templates for creating GitHub issues for presentation extraction and consolidation

---

## Template 1: Public-Private Consolidated Extraction

**Use when:** A presentation has both public and private repos; private is source of truth (Q1 strategy)

```markdown
**Title:** Extract presentation: {Presentation Name} (public-private consolidated)

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:presentation`, `priority:high`

**Body:**

Extract presentation metadata and content from BOTH repos:
- **Public:** {public-repo-name}
- **Private:** {private-repo-name} (**SOURCE OF TRUTH**)

**Consolidation Strategy:**
- Use private repo as authoritative source
- Add public-only content if distinct
- Create single presentation entry in `src/content/presentations/{slug}.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Read both repos (private first, public secondary)
- [ ] Merge content: use private as base, supplement with public if different
- [ ] Extract: title, description, abstract, learning objectives, tags, level, durations
- [ ] Set status to 'active' or 'retired' based on delivery history
- [ ] Create `src/content/presentations/{slug}.md` with Zod-compliant frontmatter
- [ ] Add hero image (or default if missing)
- [ ] Link both repos in 'resources' array (note which is authoritative)

**Resources:**
- Private (authoritative): https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{private-repo}
- Public: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{public-repo}
- Schema: `src/content.config.ts` (presentations collection)

**Estimated Effort:** 30-45 minutes
```

---

## Template 2: Workshop Version Tracking

**Use when:** Workshop has evolved across multiple versions; versions must stay separate (Q3 exception)

```markdown
**Title:** Extract workshop: {Workshop Name} (keep versions separate)

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:presentation`, `type:workshop`, `priority:medium`

**Body:**

Extract workshop with version tracking. This workshop has evolved across multiple deliveries.
Keep versions SEPARATE per Chad's requirement (labs evolve, versions must be distinct).

**Repos:**
- {workshop-repo-v1}
- {workshop-repo-v2}
- {workshop-repo-v3}

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create SEPARATE presentation entries for each version:
  - `src/content/presentations/{slug}-v1.md`
  - `src/content/presentations/{slug}-v2.md`
  - `src/content/presentations/{slug}-v3.md`
- [ ] Each has `type: workshop`, durations array with full workshop length
- [ ] Extract 6-10 learning objectives per version
- [ ] Link to lab materials/exercises in resources (note version)
- [ ] Set level: intermediate/advanced (most workshops)
- [ ] Note any prerequisites or dependencies
- [ ] Link to all version-specific repos

**Resources:**
- Repo v1: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{repo-v1}
- Repo v2: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{repo-v2}
- Repo v3: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{repo-v3}

**Estimated Effort:** 60-75 minutes (3 versions @ 20-25 min each)
```

---

## Template 3: Event-Specific Variants (Event Mapping)

**Use when:** Single base presentation with multiple event-specific deliveries (Q3 strategy)

```markdown
**Title:** Map {Base Presentation} to events (multiple deliveries)

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:engagementPresentations`, `priority:medium`, `depends-on-presentations`

**Body:**

{Base Presentation} has multiple event-specific repos. Map to event-specific engagementPresentations.

**Presentation Base:** {base-presentation-slug} (create via separate issue first)

**Event Variants:**
- {event-repo-1} → {conference}, {date}
- {event-repo-2} → {conference}, {date}
- {event-repo-3} → {conference}, {date}

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Base presentation exists in `src/content/presentations/{slug}.md`
- [ ] Create `src/content/events/{event-slug}.md` for each unique event
- [ ] Create `src/content/engagementPresentations/{event-slug}-{pres-slug}.md` for each delivery
- [ ] Each engagementPresentation:
  - Links to correct event ID
  - Links to correct presentation ID
  - Includes event-specific custom content (if exists)
  - Notes any custom slides/demos/labs per event
- [ ] All events have venue, dates, city, country

**Dependencies:**
- Issue #{presentation-issue}: Create base presentation first
- Issue #{event-issue}: Create event entries first

**Resources:**
- Repo 1: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{event-repo-1}
- Repo 2: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{event-repo-2}
- Repo 3: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{event-repo-3}

**Estimated Effort:** 20-30 minutes (after base presentation exists)
```

---

## Template 4: Private-Only Presentation

**Use when:** Presentation has ONLY private repo, no public equivalent

```markdown
**Title:** Extract private-only presentation: {Presentation Name}

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:presentation`, `priority:medium`, `private-only`

**Body:**

This presentation has ONLY a private repo (no public equivalent).
Extract and determine if it should be surfaced publicly or kept internal.

**Private Repo (only source):**
- https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{private-repo}

**Questions for Chad:**
- Should this presentation appear on the public portfolio?
- If yes, should content be sanitized? (remove proprietary demos, etc.)
- If no, archive as internal-only reference

**Acceptance Criteria (if public):**
- [ ] Sanitize any proprietary/client-specific content
- [ ] Create `src/content/presentations/{slug}.md`
- [ ] Mark clearly if content is derived from private-only source
- [ ] Extract: title, description, abstract, learning objectives, tags
- [ ] Set appropriate access level in frontmatter (if supported)

**Acceptance Criteria (if internal):**
- [ ] Document in team history why not surfaced
- [ ] Create internal reference if needed

**Resources:**
- Private repo: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{private-repo}
- Schema: `src/content.config.ts`

**Note:** Awaiting Chad clarification on public vs. internal handling.

**Estimated Effort:** 30-45 minutes (or blocked pending clarification)
```

---

## Template 5: Archived Repo Consolidation

**Use when:** Presentation has archived/delete-marked repo to consolidate with public (Q2 strategy)

```markdown
**Title:** Consolidate archived repo: {Presentation Name}-delete

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:presentation`, `priority:low`, `archived`

**Body:**

This presentation has an archived/delete-marked repo. Consolidate into public equivalent.

**Repos:**
- **Public (active):** https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{public-repo}
- **Archived (delete-marked):** https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{archived-repo}

**Consolidation Strategy:**
- Use public as primary source
- Check archived for any unique content
- If no unique content: skip (no new extraction needed)
- If unique content: merge into public entry

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Review both repos for content differences
- [ ] If no unique content in archived: mark as duplicate, no action needed
- [ ] If unique content: merge into existing public presentation entry
- [ ] Create/update `src/content/presentations/{slug}.md`
- [ ] Link to public repo only (archived is deprecated)
- [ ] Document decision in commit message

**Resources:**
- Public repo: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{public-repo}
- Archived repo: https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{archived-repo}

**Estimated Effort:** 15-20 minutes (mostly review/verification)
```

---

## Template 6: Priority Cluster

**Use when:** Complex presentation series with multiple repos, events, and variants

```markdown
**Title:** [CLUSTER] Extract {Presentation Series Name}

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:presentation`, `content:engagementPresentations`, `priority:high`, `cluster`

**Body:**

This is a complex presentation series with multiple repos and event deliveries.
Extract entire series with event mapping.

**Base Presentation(s):**
- {repo-1} (private, source of truth)
- {repo-2} (public variant)
- {repo-3} (related variant)

**Event Deliveries:**
- {Event 1}, {Date}
- {Event 2}, {Date}
- {Event 3}, {Date}

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Determine if N repos represent 1, 2, or 3 unique presentations
- [ ] Create base presentation(s) from private repo
- [ ] Create event entries for each conference
- [ ] Create engagementPresentations linking presentations to events
- [ ] Extract event-specific content/demos/slides
- [ ] Tag comprehensively (extract from repo READMEs)
- [ ] Cross-link related presentations if multiple base presentations exist

**Resources:**
- Private (authoritative): https://github.com/TaleLearnCode/{private-repo}
- Public variants: {list repos}
- Need: Event research (exact dates, CFP submissions if available)

**Dependencies:**
- Related presentations may share event slots; coordinate timing

**Estimated Effort:** 4-6 hours (complex, multiple repos, event research, potential variant analysis)
```

---

## Template 7: Batch Processing

**Use when:** Processing multiple similar presentations in a category

```markdown
**Title:** Batch extract presentations: {Category} [#N-#M]

**Labels:** `squad:dallas`, `content:presentation`, `priority:medium`, `batch`

**Body:**

Batch extraction for remaining presentations in {category}.
Process all repos in this category using standard workflow.

**Category:** {category}

**Repos (N total):**
1. {repo-1} → `{presentation-slug}`
2. {repo-2} → `{presentation-slug}`
3. {repo-3} → `{presentation-slug}`
... (list all)

**Standard Workflow (per repo):**
- Read repo README for title, abstract, learning objectives
- Extract key metadata: level, tags, durations, resource links
- Create `src/content/presentations/{slug}.md`
- Set status (active/retired)
- Add to presentations collection

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All N repos processed
- [ ] Each has `src/content/presentations/{slug}.md` entry
- [ ] Frontmatter is Zod-compliant (no schema violations)
- [ ] All entries follow naming conventions
- [ ] Tags are consistent with enum values (check `src/content.config.ts`)

**Resources:**
- Repos: {links}
- Schema: `src/content.config.ts`

**Estimated Effort:** {N × 25-30 minutes} (depends on batch size)
```

---

## Usage Notes

**Template Selection Guide:**
1. **Template 1** (Public-Private): Most common; use when both repos exist
2. **Template 2** (Workshop): Use for multi-version workshops only
3. **Template 3** (Event Mapping): Use AFTER base presentation created
4. **Template 4** (Private-Only): Rare; usually needs Chad approval
5. **Template 5** (Archived): Low priority; verify consolidation first
6. **Template 6** (Cluster): High-value presentations with complex history
7. **Template 7** (Batch): For remaining presentations after priorities done

**Label System:**
- `squad:dallas` - Assigned to Dallas
- `content:presentation` - Modifies presentations collection
- `content:engagementPresentations` - Modifies event mappings
- `priority:high/medium/low` - Execution order
- `type:workshop` - Special handling required
- `cluster` - Multi-repo complexity
- `batch` - Bulk processing
- `depends-on-presentations` - Blocked by other issues
- `private-only` - Needs Chad review
- `archived` - Consolidation verification required
